designSystemFinal.name: MOSC Creator Analytics (Final Page Design Spec)
designSystemFinal.purpose: A comprehensive, AI-oriented design spec for building new features that match the exact styling, structure, and component patterns used on /mosc/creator-analytics. This file is page-specific and complements (does not replace) the broader MOSC design system.

layout.notes: Pages under /mosc/* render within MOSCLayout (MOSCHeader + NavigationBreadcrumb + MOSCFooter).

designPhilosophy.visualLanguage: Warm earth tones, serif headings, soft shadows, generous spacing, subtle transitions

accessibility.focusRings: Always include focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 on interactive controls
accessibility.labels: All form inputs must have <label htmlFor=...>

PageRoot.notes: MOSCLayout already sets the body/background, but this page container keeps consistency.

headerBlock.iconContainer: w-12 h-12 bg-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center sacred-shadow
headerBlock.title: font-heading font-semibold text-3xl lg:text-4xl text-foreground mb-4
headerBlock.subtitle: font-body text-lg text-muted-foreground max-w-3xl mx-auto

dateRangeToggle.labelLeft: font-body text-lg font-semibold transition-colors duration-300 reverent-transition

toggleButton.baseClassName: relative inline-flex h-10 w-16 items-center rounded-full transition-all duration-300 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 hover:scale-105 reverent-transition
toggleButton.thumb: inline-flex items-center justify-center h-8 w-8 transform rounded-full bg-card transition-transform duration-300 sacred-shadow-sm

dateRangeToggle.labelRight: font-body text-lg font-semibold transition-colors duration-300 reverent-transition

header.iconContainer: w-12 h-12 bg-primary/10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center
header.title: font-heading font-semibold text-2xl text-foreground
header.subtitle: font-body text-sm text-muted-foreground

form.inputBase: w-full px-4 py-3 bg-input border rounded-lg font-body text-foreground placeholder-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 reverent-transition
form.selectBase: w-full px-4 py-3 bg-input border border-border rounded-lg font-body text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 reverent-transition
form.textareaBase: w-full px-4 py-3 bg-input border rounded-lg font-body text-foreground placeholder-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 reverent-transition resize-none

errorMessage.container: mt-2 inline-flex items-center gap-2 rounded-md bg-red-50 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-body text-red-700 border border-red-300
errorMessage.badge: inline-flex h-5 w-5 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-red-600 text-white text-[11px] font-bold

statusMessage.iconBubble: mt-0.5 flex h-8 w-8 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-white/90 sacred-shadow-sm flex-shrink-0
statusMessage.title: font-heading text-sm font-semibold

submitButton.className: w-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground font-body font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-lg hover:bg-primary/90 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 reverent-transition flex items-center justify-center space-x-2

statsGrid.gridClassName: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-8 mb-12
statsGrid.cardBase: bg-card rounded-lg sacred-shadow p-6 hover:sacred-shadow-lg reverent-transition text-center group
statsGrid.iconContainerBase: w-16 h-16 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4 reverent-transition
statsGrid.label: font-body text-sm text-muted-foreground

growthMetricsGrid.cardGradientPrimary: bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/10 via-primary/5 to-transparent rounded-lg sacred-shadow p-8 border border-primary/20
growthMetricsGrid.cardGradientSuccess: bg-gradient-to-br from-success/10 via-success/5 to-transparent rounded-lg sacred-shadow p-8 border border-success/20
growthMetricsGrid.headerIconBubble: w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center

topPerformingContentList.headerIconBubble: w-8 h-8 bg-primary rounded-full flex items-center justify-center
topPerformingContentList.itemContainer: border border-border rounded-lg p-6 hover:sacred-shadow reverent-transition bg-card

actionButton.className: flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-primary/10 hover:bg-primary/20 flex items-center justify-center transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-110 reverent-transition

implementationRulesForAI.inheritFromBaseDesignSystem: Start with design_systems/mosc/mosc_site_general_design.json rules; this file is the exact page-level override/spec for /mosc/creator-analytics.

colors.neverHardcode: Never use hex colors or gray palettes; follow MOSC semantic tokens.

forms.inputBaseMustMatch: w-full px-4 py-3 bg-input border rounded-lg font-body text-foreground placeholder-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2 reverent-transition
forms.errorState: Switch border from border-border to border-destructive and show the red error pill below.
forms.statusBanner: Use the success/error banner style with sacred-shadow-sm and icon bubble.

icons.notes: AppIcon wraps lucide-react icons by string name; unknown names fall back to HelpCircle.

verification.jsonNotes: This file is intentionally explicit (exact classnames) to enable deterministic UI reproduction by AI.
